metadata.note: 补建说明：该 JSON evidence report 为后续补建，用于 0.1.0-alpha.0 release-candidate adoption evidence 在 R1 内核精炼后引用 clean local benchmark report；当前进度：accepted as local-evidence-only report for commit 5922fb2, with dynamic measurements kept in JSON only.

caveat: This is a local competitive benchmark for text-layout primitives, not a release gate and not a full TUI renderer/event-loop benchmark.

workloads.description: Full-document plain terminal wrapping with CJK, emoji, tabs, hard breaks, and terminal-session prose.
Repeated resize relayout over one prepared mixed-language buffer.
ANSI SGR inline style wrapping with plain text materialization plus ANSI re-emission.
OSC8 hyperlink metadata wrapping with URI policy and explicit ANSI re-emission.
Large fixed-column viewport page lookup, comparing range/page materialization against full-wrap-and-slice baselines.

caveats: Pretext results include source-range capable terminal layout work. OSC8 policy is not exercised by this workload.
Comparator does not provide source-offset ranges, sparse page caches, or host-neutral layout handles.

results.notes: prepareTerminal + walk/materialize all rows per sample iteration.
wrapAnsi hard-wraps the whole input per sample iteration.
Intl.Segmenter + string-width greedy hard wrap per sample iteration.
prepare once, relayout/materialize across resize widths per sample iteration.
wrapAnsi rewraps raw input for every resize width.
string-width greedy wrapper rewraps raw input for every resize width.
tokenize SGR metadata, terminal layout, materialize rich lines with explicit ANSI sidecar.
strip ANSI then greedy hard-wrap visible text only.
tokenize SGR metadata, terminal layout, materialize rich lines with explicit ANSI sidecar.
strip ANSI then greedy hard-wrap visible text only.
prepare, build fixed-column index/cache, fetch requested pages per sample iteration.
reuse prepared text, sparse index, and page cache across repeated viewport page requests.
best-case baseline: wrap full input once, then slice requested viewport pages.
best-case greedy baseline: full wrap once, then slice requested viewport pages.
